tluaNumberKeyDistinct.tlua(8,7): error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaNumberKeyDistinct.tlua(9,7): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== tluaNumberKeyDistinct.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // Lua distinguishes number keys from string keys: t[1] and t["1"] are
    // different slots.
    local t = { [1] = "a", ["1"] = 1 };
    local n: string = t[1];
    local s: number = t["1"];
    
    // Cross-access errors: the other namespace's type does not match.
    local bad1: number = t[1];
          ~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    local bad2: string = t["1"];
          ~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    
    // Same distinction in type position: 1 is a number key, "1" a string key.
    interface I {
      1: number;
      "1": string;
    }
    declare i: I;
    local in1: number = i[1];
    local is1: string = i["1"];
    
    local es = {n, s, bad1, bad2, in1, is1};
